children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to each Commission to carry out this subtitle $40,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2025 through 2029.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), not more than 10 percent of the funds made available to a Commission in a fiscal year under this section may be used for administrative expenses.

children.heading: .—Limited funding
children.label: 2 .—Limited funding
children.text: In a case in which less than $10,000,000 is made available to a Commission for a fiscal year under this section, paragraph (1) shall not apply.
